title: stapelia schinzii var. angolensis
intro: Stapelia schinzii var. angolensis, also known as the starfish cactus or Stapelia, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, the Stapelia schinzii var. angolensis plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been shown to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antiviral activity. Herbal preparations of the Stapelia schinzii var. angolensis plant are often used in traditional medicine, and the plant's extracts can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and ointments.
